columns.extraction_plan: The control arm is explicitly stated in the abstract and methods section. It can also be inferred from the labels in figures and tables. On page 1, in the "METHODS" section of the abstract, it states: "Patients with metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer were randomly assigned to darolutamide or placebo plus androgen-deprivation therapy and docetaxel." On page 2, in the "Trial Design" section under "METHODS", it states: "Enrolled patients were randomly assigned (1:1) to oral darolutamide 600 mg twice daily or matched placebo, in combination with ADT and docetaxel." In Figure 1 (CONSORT flow diagram) on page 3, one of the main arms is labeled "Placebo + docetaxel + ADT." In Figure 2 (OS in subgroups) on page 6, the legend for the control arm is "Placebo + ADT + docetaxel." In Figure 3 (Time to castration-resistant prostate cancer) on page 7, the legend for the control arm is "Placebo + ADT + docetaxel."
